input:
Hospitalization report (immunoglobulin treatment)
The child KherissiMaram, aged 06 years and 10 months, originally from and residing in Oran, followed since 03/2024 for atypical severe combined immunodeficiency (Skidlike), Hospitalized at our level on 03/10/2026 for the treatment of immunoglobulin N: 40. Main diagnosis: Atypical severe combined immunodeficiency (skidlike)
Associated diagnoses: COPD, BDD, severe CKD grade 2, pan cytopenia
Date of diagnosis: 03/19/2024
Age of diagnosis: 05 years
Diagnostic elements:
Anamnestic; -Consanguinity
-Death at a young age of 02 paternal uncles
-Chronic cough, recurrent respiratory infections
Clinic:
-Repeated respiratory infection
-Chronic respiratory failure: Clubbing, Thoracic deformation
-Delay in weight growth
Biology
- Immunodeficiency assessment done on 03/13/2024, showing: an atypical severe combined immunodeficiency (leaky SCID). - Pan-hypogammaglobulinemiaIgG: 0.29g/l IgA: 0.27g/l IgM: 0.18 g/l
- Profound T and B lymphopenia with virtual absence of naive T lymphocytes
Radiological:
-Thoracic CT 11/2024: bilateral DDB with thoracic distension
Processing in progress:
Twice-daily physiotherapy + Na+ nebulization
O2 therapy at home
FORACORT spray 100 UG/6UG 01 puffs /2/d
Prophylactic antibiotic therapy:
Bactrim 01ddp et1/2/d
Itraconazol 100mg 01 tab/day
Zomax 01 DDP/ 1 day out of 2
Immunoglobulin treatment at a rate of 0.8mg1/kg/4h at the SAP each month. Last dose received: 02/09/2026 (0.8g/kg)
Intermediate history:
Consultation: No
Respiratory: Cough with whitish sputum,
Hematologically: Absence of bruising or hemorrhagic episode
. CLINICAL EXAMINATION UPON ADMISSION: Date 03/10/2026
Anthropometric measurements:
Weight: 13kg (-2.3DS) Height: 108CM (-2DS). BMI: 11.15 kg/m (-4 SD) (failure to thrive)
P/A: 59%; P/T: 72% Moderate to severe malnutrition. General condition preserved, afebrile: T: 36.5° C, severe malnutrition, Absence of signs of dehydration
Skin exam:
Healed burn lesions on both buttocks and left thigh
Pleuropulmonary examination: wet, polypneic cough, Fr: 44 c/min, SpO2: 95% under 3 Liters of O2
Signs of chronic respiratory failure: clubbing,
Thoracic deformity
Lung auscultation: polymorphic rales
Cardiovascular examination: HR: 100 b/min, CRT < 3 sec, Auscultation: B1, B2 audible goods, absence of added noises
Abdominopelvic examination: Soft abdomen, no organomegaly, free hernial orifices, preserved transit
ENT: Clean throat, tooth decay
Review of other devices: Is unremarkable
PARACLINICAL ASSESSMENT UPON ADMISSION: 03/10/26
NFS: GB: 3780 element, PNN: 760; lymphocyte: 2080
HB: 7.8 g/dl; VGM: 1O1 fl; CCMH: 29.5 [normocytic normochrome anemia]
PLQ: 47,000 el/mm 3. CRP: negative VS: 53 mm/h (1st hour) 96 mm/h (2nd hour)
Ionogram: Na: 133.2mmol/l K: 3.84 mmol/l Cl: 104.1 mmol/l
Ferritin: 37.32 ng/ml 25 OH Vit D: 19.4 ng/ml
Support and evolution:
Hospitalization
Conditioning + peripheral venous lines
Immunoglobulin 0.8g/kg i.e. 10g
Interview for respiratory physiotherapy
Dietary interview
Psychological interview. The immunoglobulin treatment passed without incident, the child was discharged with a follow-up appointment for 01/04/206
development of the disease:
Nutritionally:
Failure to thrive: Weight: 13 kg (-2.3 DS) Height: 108 CM (-2 DS). BMI: 11.15 kg/m (-4 SD)
Moderate to severe malnutrition: Gomez: 59% Waterloo: 72%
Nutritional report: 11/18/2025 (correct)
Vitamin D3: 19.4 ng/ml Ferritinemia: 37.32 ng/ml Albuminemia: 39.9ng/ml
On the cardiac level:
B1B2 audible, no added noise or hiss, HR: 98 b/min
Absence of signs of chronic cor pulmonale
Echoheart:
On the respiratory level:
Signs of chronic respiratory failure: Chest deformation with clubbing.
Permanent bronchial congestion
Permanent mild respiratory distress requiring home oxygen therapy 1L/min
Gasometry 05/2025: severe CKD grade 2
pH: 7.235 PO2: 43.4 mmhg PCO2: 58.7mmhg
EFR 03/07/2025: restrictive syndrome with drop in FVC and FEV1, FEV1 value not increased by b2mimetic, BUT agitated child
CVF:
Chest CT:
On the digestive level:
Soft abdomen, preserved transit. Absence of organomegaly. Abdomino-pelvic ultrasound:
On the Hematological level:
Externalized cutaneous hemorrhagic syndrome
FNS: NFS: GB: 4430 item, PNN: 2660; lymphocyte: 1020
HB: 9.5 g/dl; MCV: 93fl; CCMH: 34.2 [normocytic normochrome anemia]
PLQ: 30,000 el/mm 3. Peripheral blood smear: 08/19/2025
Myelogram:
Hematoscopic opinion made on 02/09/2025: Richness 1 to 2 with indication BOM TO DISCUSS IF (It is a congenital amegakaryocyte or beginning of bone marrow aplasia with indication of karyotype) > SUSPICION OF FANCONI. Karyotype done on 07/11/2025: karyotype impossible, culture failure
Residual IgG rate 02/07/2026: 8.54g/ml
In total:
The child KherissiMaram, aged 06 years and 10 months, originally from and residing in Oran, followed since 03/2024 for atypical severe combined immunodeficiency (Skidlike), complicated by DDB with oxygen-dependent stage 2 chronic respiratory failure with thrombocytopenia (monitored in Canastel pediatric hematoma) was hospitalized at our level on 03/10/2026 for her 40th treatment of immunoglobulin which passed without incident. To collect / To do:
Put underSelofer and vitamin D
Collect the vaccination card
Referral to stomatology. Appointment for the next treatment scheduled for 04/01/2026
Resident of the department: Dr Djoudi Assistant of the department: Dr OUSSALAH
